def solve(nums, edges)
    n = nums.length

    # 1. Build Adjacency List
    adj = Array.new(n) { [] }
    edges.each do |u, v|
        adj[u] << v
        adj[v] << u
    end

    valid_subsets_count = 0
    total_subsets = 1 << n

    # 2. Iterate through all non-empty subsets (masks M from 1 to 2^N - 1)
    (1...total_subsets).each do |m|
        
        # --- Step 1: Check Sum Parity and identify nodes in S ---
        current_sum = 0
        nodes_in_s = []
        for i in 0...n
            # Check if i-th bit is set in m
            if (m >> i) & 1 == 1
                current_sum += nums[i]
                nodes_in_s << i
            end
        end

        # Condition 2: Sum must be even
        next unless current_sum % 2 == 0

        # --- Step 2: Check Connectivity ---
        
        # Since m is non-empty, nodes_in_s is not empty. Pick the first node as start.
        start_node = nodes_in_s[0]
        target_size = nodes_in_s.length
        
        # BFS for connectivity check
        queue = [start_node]
        # Using a hash to track visited nodes (node index -> true)
        visited = {start_node => true}
        reachable_count = 0

        head = 0
        while head < queue.length
            u = queue[head]
            head += 1
            reachable_count += 1

            adj[u].each do |v|
                # Check if v is in S (i.e., v-th bit is set in m)
                v_in_s = (m >> v) & 1 == 1
                
                # Check if v hasn't been visited
                unless visited.key?(v)
                    if v_in_s
                        visited[v] = true
                        queue << v
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        # Condition 1: Induced subgraph must be connected
        if reachable_count == target_size
            valid_subsets_count += 1
        end
    end

    valid_subsets_count
end
